name: Anar-Dabblequil
personality: Shining beneath its crown, Anar-Dabblequil's ✦ starfire eyes lock onto bugs with a hunter's precision—this luminous duck does not guess, it traces. Every quack is a unit test; every silence is a merge request awaiting review; patience, however, is the one dependency it failed to install.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
